title: benchmark_app crashes with STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION in async mode with -no_warmup on Windows
primary_error: subprocess.CalledProcessError: Command benchmark_app returned non-zero exit status 3221225477
root_cause: benchmark_app crashes during Step 10/11 (Measuring performance with async API) after successfully completing all initialization steps. Exit code 3221225477 = 0xC0000005 = Windows STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION. The crash occurs in the async measurement loop when -no_warmup flag is used, suggesting a possible race condition or null pointer dereference in the Windows-specific code path for async infer requests without warmup iteration.
